allow: PowerShell($s = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/jobs/search?workplace=remote&limit=3"; "REMOTE ONLY:"; $s.jobs | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.score\)% $\($_.title\) [$\($_.workplace\)]" }; $s2 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/jobs/search?q=sales&limit=3"; "Q=sales:"; $s2.jobs | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.score\)% $\($_.title\)" }; $opts = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/meta/options"; "CITIES: $\($opts.cities -join ', '\)"; $job = $s.jobs[0]; $fb = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post "http://localhost:8000/api/feedback" -ContentType "application/json" -Body \(@{job_id=$job.id; event_type="hide"} | ConvertTo-Json\); "FEEDBACK: $\($fb.status\)"; $s3 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/jobs/search?workplace=remote&limit=3"; "AFTER HIDE \(should not contain '$\($job.title\)'\):"; $s3.jobs | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.title\)" })
